title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI agent that handles productivity tasks like PDF reading, spreadsheet analysis, report generation, and presentation creation. It includes 100+ domain experts, supports multi-agent teams, remote control via messaging platforms, and connects to tools like GitHub, Jira, and Google Drive.
writeup: This video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI agent built for productivity work: reading PDFs, analyzing spreadsheets, generating reports, and creating presentations. It matters as another entry in the agentic productivity space, positioned against tools like Claude and Codex. Concrete features include 100+ domain experts, support for multi-agent teams, remote control through messaging platforms, and connections to GitHub, Jira, and Google Drive.
